name: Landesbank Hessen-Thuringen Girozentrale
summary: Landesbank Hessen-Th√É¬ºringen Girozentrale provides various financial products and services in Germany and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Real Estate, Corporates & Markets, Retail & Asset Management, and WIBank. The Real Estate segment provides traditional real estate loans and financing for open-ended real estate funds, office buildings, retail outlets, retail parks, and logistics centres, as well as residential and development/portfolio financing. The Corporates & Markets segment offers tailored finance solutions, such as corporate loans, project finance, transport finance, foreign trade finance, acquisition finance, asset-backed finance, investment and leasing finance, and tax engineering. This segment also provides payment services; and engages in the trading and sales activities. The Retail & Asset Management segment provides retail, private, and custodian banking services; support for third-party and own real estate, project development, and facility management; and engages in traditional asset management and administration activities, management of special and retail funds for institutional investors; and support for master investment trust clients. The WIBank segment administers development programmes in the fields of housing, municipal and urban development, public infrastructure, business/enterprise and employment promotion, agriculture, and environmental protection. It operates through a network of 73 branches and advice centres, approximately 20 self-service banking centres, and approximately 200 automated teller machines. The company is headquartered in Frankfurt am Main, Germany. Landesbank Hessen-Th√É¬ºringen Girozentrale is a subsidiary of Sparkassen- und Giroverband Hessen-Th√É¬ºringen.
